$comment: Default capability for the overlay window (doc 11 §2, doc 13 §2). Grants ONLY core permissions — window, event (the core->WebView channels in events.rs), app lifecycle. It deliberately grants NO http/shell/fs-network permission: the transparency gate (the two-emitter rule) keeps all sockets + Claude-CLI spawning inside the reasoning-gateway crate, never the WebView. [VERIFY] permission ids against the pinned Tauri 2.x acl schema at build time.
description: Core permissions for the Aperture overlay window: window control, event channels, app lifecycle. No network/shell/fs surface (two-emitter gate, doc 13 §2).
